message:
fix(security): extend sanitize_abs_nonroot_path to acfs-global and nightly_update.sh

Applies the same path validation hardening from 32b2cc40 (acfs-update)
to the remaining two entry-point scripts:

acfs-global:
- Add sanitize_abs_nonroot_path() helper matching acfs-update
- Apply sanitization in resolve_home_for_user(), find_acfs_bin_for_home(),
  prepare_runtime_context_from_home(), read_user_for_home(), main() globals,
  exec_as_target_user(), and direct-exec path
- Reject relative, empty, and root-only ACFS_BIN_DIR values before passing
  through sudo env

nightly_update.sh:
- Add sanitize_abs_nonroot_path() and new resolve_current_home() that
  replaces the fragile one-liner HOME fallback with a validated multi-step
  resolution (HOME → root special-case → getent lookup)
- Sanitize ACFS_BIN_DIR before PATH construction
- Exit with clear error if HOME cannot be resolved

Tests:
- test_acfs_update_wrapper_discards_invalid_env_bin_dir_on_direct_exec
- test_acfs_global_wrapper_discards_invalid_env_bin_dir_on_direct_exec

Both tests verify that a relative ACFS_BIN_DIR env var is silently
discarded rather than propagated to child processes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,6 +14,17 @@ set -euo pipefail
 ACFS_STATE_FILE="${ACFS_STATE_FILE:-}"
 ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE="${ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE:-/var/lib/acfs/state.json}"
 
+sanitize_abs_nonroot_path() {
+    local path_value="${1:-}"
+
+    [[ -n "$path_value" ]] || return 1
+    path_value="${path_value%/}"
+    [[ -n "$path_value" ]] || return 1
+    [[ "$path_value" == /* ]] || return 1
+    [[ "$path_value" != "/" ]] || return 1
+    printf '%s\n' "$path_value"
+}
+
 is_valid_username() {
     local username="$1"
     [[ "$username" =~ ^[a-z_][a-z0-9_-]*$ ]]
@@ -29,8 +40,9 @@ resolve_home_for_user() {
     fi
 
     user_home="$(getent passwd "$user" 2>/dev/null | cut -d: -f6)" || true
-    if [[ -n "$user_home" ]] && [[ "$user_home" == /* ]]; then
-        printf '%s\n' "${user_home%/}"
+    user_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$user_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    if [[ -n "$user_home" ]]; then
+        printf '%s\n' "$user_home"
         return 0
     fi
 
@@ -147,6 +159,7 @@ find_acfs_bin_from_state_file() {
 find_acfs_bin_for_home() {
     local user_home="$1"
 
+    user_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$user_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
     [[ -n "$user_home" ]] || return 1
 
     if [[ -x "$user_home/.local/bin/acfs" ]]; then
@@ -188,14 +201,16 @@ home_from_acfs_bin() {
 
 prepare_runtime_context_from_home() {
     local user_home="$1"
+    local sanitized_bin_dir=""
 
+    user_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$user_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
     [[ -n "$user_home" ]] || return 1
-    [[ "$user_home" == /* ]] || return 1
-    [[ "$user_home" != "/" ]] || return 1
 
     TARGET_HOME="$user_home"
     ACFS_HOME="$user_home/.acfs"
     ACFS_STATE_FILE="$ACFS_HOME/state.json"
+    sanitized_bin_dir="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    ACFS_BIN_DIR="${sanitized_bin_dir:-}"
     if [[ -z "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" ]]; then
         ACFS_BIN_DIR="$(read_bin_dir_from_state_file "$ACFS_STATE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true)"
     fi
@@ -209,9 +224,9 @@ read_user_for_home() {
     local state_file=""
     local state_home=""
 
+    user_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$user_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
     [[ -n "$user_home" ]] || return 1
     state_file="$user_home/.acfs/state.json"
-    user_home="${user_home%/}"
 
     candidate_user="$(
         getent passwd 2>/dev/null \
@@ -417,6 +432,12 @@ main() {
     local runtime_home=""
     local runtime_user=""
     local candidate_bin=""
+    local direct_acfs_home=""
+
+    ACFS_HOME="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${ACFS_HOME:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    TARGET_HOME="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${TARGET_HOME:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    ACFS_BIN_DIR="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    export ACFS_HOME TARGET_HOME ACFS_BIN_DIR
 
     target_user="$(detect_target_user)"
     current_user="$(whoami)"
@@ -514,12 +535,19 @@ main() {
         local user="$1"
         shift
         local -a env_args=()
+        local sanitized_target_home=""
+        local sanitized_acfs_home=""
+        local sanitized_bin_dir=""
+
+        sanitized_target_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${TARGET_HOME:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+        sanitized_acfs_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${ACFS_HOME:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+        sanitized_bin_dir="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
 
         [[ -n "${ACFS_STATE_FILE:-}" ]] && env_args+=("ACFS_STATE_FILE=$ACFS_STATE_FILE")
         [[ -n "${ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE:-}" ]] && env_args+=("ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE=$ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE")
-        [[ -n "${TARGET_HOME:-}" ]] && env_args+=("TARGET_HOME=$TARGET_HOME")
-        [[ -n "${ACFS_HOME:-}" ]] && env_args+=("ACFS_HOME=$ACFS_HOME")
-        [[ -n "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" ]] && env_args+=("ACFS_BIN_DIR=$ACFS_BIN_DIR")
+        [[ -n "$sanitized_target_home" ]] && env_args+=("TARGET_HOME=$sanitized_target_home")
+        [[ -n "$sanitized_acfs_home" ]] && env_args+=("ACFS_HOME=$sanitized_acfs_home")
+        [[ -n "$sanitized_bin_dir" ]] && env_args+=("ACFS_BIN_DIR=$sanitized_bin_dir")
         [[ -n "${ACFS_REF:-}" ]] && env_args+=("ACFS_REF=$ACFS_REF")
         [[ -n "${ACFS_RAW:-}" ]] && env_args+=("ACFS_RAW=$ACFS_RAW")
 
@@ -553,10 +581,11 @@ main() {
     # If we're already the target user, run directly
     if [[ "$current_user" == "$target_user" ]]; then
         if [[ -n "${TARGET_HOME:-}" ]]; then
+            direct_acfs_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${ACFS_HOME:-$TARGET_HOME/.acfs}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
             exec env \
                 HOME="$TARGET_HOME" \
                 TARGET_HOME="$TARGET_HOME" \
-                ACFS_HOME="${ACFS_HOME:-$TARGET_HOME/.acfs}" \
+                ACFS_HOME="${direct_acfs_home:-$TARGET_HOME/.acfs}" \
                 ACFS_BIN_DIR="${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" \
                 "$acfs_bin" "$@"
         fi

@@ -16,8 +16,50 @@
 
 set -euo pipefail
 
+sanitize_abs_nonroot_path() {
+    local path_value="${1:-}"
+
+    [[ -n "$path_value" ]] || return 1
+    path_value="${path_value%/}"
+    [[ -n "$path_value" ]] || return 1
+    [[ "$path_value" == /* ]] || return 1
+    [[ "$path_value" != "/" ]] || return 1
+    printf '%s\n' "$path_value"
+}
+
+resolve_current_home() {
+    local current_user=""
+    local home_candidate=""
+
+    home_candidate="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${HOME:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    if [[ -n "$home_candidate" ]]; then
+        printf '%s\n' "$home_candidate"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    current_user="$(id -un 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    if [[ "$current_user" == "root" ]]; then
+        printf '/root\n'
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    if [[ -n "$current_user" ]]; then
+        home_candidate="$(getent passwd "$current_user" 2>/dev/null | cut -d: -f6 | head -n 1)" || true
+        home_candidate="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$home_candidate" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+        if [[ -n "$home_candidate" ]]; then
+            printf '%s\n' "$home_candidate"
+            return 0
+        fi
+    fi
+
+    return 1
+}
+
 # Resolve home directory (systemd %h may not set HOME reliably)
-HOME="${HOME:-$(getent passwd "$(id -un)" | cut -d: -f6)}"
+HOME="$(resolve_current_home)" || {
+    echo "ERROR: Unable to resolve a valid HOME for nightly update" >&2
+    exit 1
+}
 export HOME
 
 read_bin_dir_from_state_file() {
@@ -53,6 +95,9 @@ for state_candidate in \
     break
 done
 
+ACFS_BIN_DIR="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+export ACFS_BIN_DIR
+
 PATH_PREFIX=""
 if [[ -n "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" ]]; then
     PATH_PREFIX="${ACFS_BIN_DIR}:"

@@ -1410,6 +1410,34 @@ EOF
     cleanup_mock_env
 }
 
+test_acfs_update_wrapper_discards_invalid_env_bin_dir_on_direct_exec() {
+    setup_system_state_target_home_only_env
+
+    mkdir -p "$TEST_HOME/probe" "$TEST_TARGET_HOME/.acfs/scripts/lib"
+    cp "$REPO_ROOT/scripts/acfs-update" "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs-update"
+    chmod +x "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs-update"
+
+    cat > "$TEST_TARGET_HOME/.acfs/scripts/lib/update.sh" <<'EOF'
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+printf 'ACFS_BIN_DIR=%s TARGET_HOME=%s\n' "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" "${TARGET_HOME:-}"
+EOF
+    chmod +x "$TEST_TARGET_HOME/.acfs/scripts/lib/update.sh"
+
+    local output=""
+    output=$(HOME="$TEST_ROOT_HOME" ACFS_HOME="$TEST_ROOT_HOME/.acfs" TARGET_HOME="$TEST_ROOT_HOME" \
+        ACFS_STATE_FILE="$TEST_ROOT_HOME/.acfs/state.json" ACFS_BIN_DIR="relative/bin" \
+        PATH="$TEST_FAKE_BIN:/usr/bin:/bin" ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE="$TEST_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE" \
+        bash "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs-update" --dry-run 2>&1)
+
+    if [[ "$output" == "ACFS_BIN_DIR= TARGET_HOME=$TEST_TARGET_HOME" ]]; then
+        harness_pass "acfs-update wrapper discards invalid env bin_dir on direct exec"
+    else
+        harness_fail "acfs-update wrapper discards invalid env bin_dir on direct exec" "$output"
+    fi
+
+    cleanup_mock_env
+}
+
 test_acfs_update_wrapper_ignores_stale_home_adjacent_target_user() {
     setup_mock_env
 
@@ -1580,6 +1608,34 @@ EOF
     cleanup_mock_env
 }
 
+test_acfs_global_wrapper_discards_invalid_env_bin_dir_on_direct_exec() {
+    setup_system_state_target_home_only_env
+
+    mkdir -p "$TEST_HOME/probe" "$TEST_TARGET_HOME/.local/bin"
+    cp "$REPO_ROOT/scripts/acfs-global" "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs"
+    chmod +x "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs"
+
+    cat > "$TEST_TARGET_HOME/.local/bin/acfs" <<'EOF'
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+printf 'ACFS_BIN_DIR=%s TARGET_HOME=%s\n' "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" "${TARGET_HOME:-}"
+EOF
+    chmod +x "$TEST_TARGET_HOME/.local/bin/acfs"
+
+    local output=""
+    output=$(HOME="$TEST_ROOT_HOME" ACFS_HOME="$TEST_ROOT_HOME/.acfs" TARGET_HOME="$TEST_ROOT_HOME" \
+        ACFS_STATE_FILE="$TEST_ROOT_HOME/.acfs/state.json" ACFS_BIN_DIR="relative/bin" \
+        PATH="$TEST_FAKE_BIN:/usr/bin:/bin" ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE="$TEST_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE" \
+        bash "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs" version 2>&1)
+
+    if [[ "$output" == "ACFS_BIN_DIR= TARGET_HOME=$TEST_TARGET_HOME" ]]; then
+        harness_pass "global acfs wrapper discards invalid env bin_dir on direct exec"
+    else
+        harness_fail "global acfs wrapper discards invalid env bin_dir on direct exec" "$output"
+    fi
+
+    cleanup_mock_env
+}
+
 test_acfs_global_wrapper_does_not_guess_current_home_when_target_home_is_unresolved() {
     setup_mock_env
 
@@ -2231,10 +2287,12 @@ main() {
     test_acfs_update_wrapper_uses_system_state_target_home_when_getent_unavailable || true
     test_acfs_update_wrapper_repairs_runtime_home_on_direct_exec || true
     test_acfs_update_wrapper_passes_bin_dir_from_state || true
+    test_acfs_update_wrapper_discards_invalid_env_bin_dir_on_direct_exec || true
     test_acfs_update_wrapper_ignores_stale_home_adjacent_target_user || true
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_uses_system_state_target_home_when_getent_unavailable || true
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_repairs_runtime_home_on_direct_exec || true
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_passes_bin_dir_from_state || true
+    test_acfs_global_wrapper_discards_invalid_env_bin_dir_on_direct_exec || true
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_does_not_guess_current_home_when_target_home_is_unresolved || true
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_ignores_stale_home_adjacent_target_user || true
     test_doctor_agent_checks_use_target_context_under_root_home || true
